---
title: "Demo Module: Pedagogical Page Designs and Interactions"
subtitle: "MOD001"
id: "mod001"
toc: false
---

Demonstration module showcasing page templates and pedagogical interactions in the Quarto course system.

## Sessions


- [SE01: Demo Session: Page Design and Interaction Showcase](se01/index.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="se01/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Demo Session: Page Design and Interaction Showcase</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
